description: Test project for dry-run smoke test
quality_checks: uv run ruff check ralph.py tests/

epic_addenda.M2: All tests go in tests/ directory only.

tasks.title: First completed task
tasks.description: This is first completed task that serves as a dependency for other tasks in the chain. It is already marked complete to provide the foundation for pending tasks.
acceptance_criteria: First completed task passes all quality checks
First completed task verifies base functionality with tests/test_sample.py

tasks.title: Second completed task
tasks.description: This is a second completed task demonstrating multiple completed tasks in the test fixture. Used to verify that completed tasks are properly filtered out during dry-run.
acceptance_criteria: Second completed task has passing tests in tests/test_example.py

tasks.title: Pending task with multiple dependencies
tasks.description: A pending task that depends on both completed tasks M2-01 and M2-02. This verifies that the dry-run correctly identifies tasks whose dependencies are all satisfied.
acceptance_criteria: Pending task with dependencies completes successfully
Both M2-01 and M2-02 dependencies are satisfied
Task processes multiple dependency chains with tests/test_multi_dep.py

tasks.title: Pending task with single dependency
tasks.description: A pending task that depends only on M2-03. This creates a chain: M2-01 -> M2-02 -> M2-03 -> M2-04 to verify sequential dependency resolution.
acceptance_criteria: Single dependency chain is properly resolved
M2-03 is completed before M2-04 executes
Tests verify chain ordering with tests/test_chain.py

tasks.title: Independent pending task
tasks.description: A pending task with no dependencies that should be selectable immediately alongside other ready tasks. This tests independent task filtering.
acceptance_criteria: No dependency checking required for this task
